SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: A = Health Insurance/Supplemental Medical Insurance (HI/SMI) Entitlement Based Upon Disability on 
 Another Claim Number 
C = Retirement Insurance Benefit/Disability Insurance Benefit (RIB/DIB) Entitlement 
F = Favorable Decision for DIB Re-entitlement 
K = Invalid Code Entered 
L = 1972 Blind Provision 
N = Blind, 1967 Definition 
P = Blind — Prior to Age 31, 1967 Definition 
R = Insured Under Special Insured Status Provision for
